raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/year> I submitted a balance transfer from Citi Bank to Bank XXXX XXXX and it was applied to the wrong account. Citi Bank after 9 months of wasting my time still has no resolved the issue and they refuse to take any action to fix it stating the money is transferred and there is nothing they can do because the money went through. 
Bank XXXX XXXX advised I file a missing payment investigation with them and were also unable to help stating they can not confirm where the money was applied to.
